units.content: GEM paper uses GMM-based distributional clustering for entity-type classification
Claim 1's population-decomposition analyser is distinguished from GEM
tension, decompose, split, storage constitute a strict causal chain
minimum-component-size and minimum-inter-component-separation guards extend beyond BIC alone
identifier-aliasing in the event log preserves parent-entity classifications
split is effected as a feedback action into the measurement store
combination of causal chain, guards, aliasing, and feedback distinguishes Claim 1 from GEM prior art
